name: Kolide Privileged Accounts Stale (30 days)
description: Detects privileged kolide accounts with stale login activity.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name, u.last_seen_at AS last_login FROM kolide_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND (LOWER(COALESCE(u.role, '')) LIKE '%admin%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role, '')) LIKE '%owner%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role, '')) LIKE '%super%') AND (u.last_seen_at IS NULL OR u.last_seen_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days')
remediation: Review privileged stale accounts immediately; remove excessive privileges or disable unused access.
